overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing an astronaut character exploring a futuristic industrial facility. The character walks through a large public concourse featuring a holographic memorial sculpture, proceeds down a narrow service corridor, and enters a private living quarters room to explore the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: public concourse with holographic memorial sculpture

events.description: character walks past the large holographic head sculpture on the right
character passes the vertical MARS recruitment poster on the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the public concourse following a red-haired NPC

notable_agents.action: red-haired NPC in white outfit walking ahead leading the way
technician standing near the holographic sculpture display

entered.detail: tall industrial ceiling with exposed trusses and girders
large metallic human head hologram on display pedestal
large vertical orange poster with MARS text and astronaut image
green-painted steel support beams and framework
illuminated display screen near the sculpture

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious industrial concourse with a high ceiling supported by metal trusses. A large holographic head sculpture dominates the right side while a prominent MARS recruitment poster hangs on the left wall. The character follows a red-haired NPC through the area, passing other pedestrians and approaching a doorway at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with utility piping

events.description: character enters doorway transitioning from open concourse to narrow corridor
character approaches door marked A12 at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow corridor toward the room entrance

notable_agents.action: child in red jacket standing near door A12

entered.detail: grey metal walls with pipes and conduits running along them
thick cables and pipes suspended from the ceiling
white metal cart stacked with supplies and bags
metal door with A12 designation above it

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed service corridor with metal walls and grated flooring. Overhead utility pipes and cables run the length of the hallway. The character walks past a supply cart and approaches door A12, where a child stands nearby. The lighting is dimmer and more confined compared to the open concourse.

scene_state.functional_zone: private living quarters with office and sleeping area

events.description: character enters private quarters room A12 from the corridor
character stops walking and begins looking around the room interior

agents.ego_description: entering the room and examining the desk, bed, and living space

entered.detail: large dark desk with terminal and items on surface
illuminated computer screen on the desk
metal slatted shutters covering the far wall
tall cabinet with shelves containing items
large dark screen mounted on the right wall
metal frame bed with white pillow
low table with book and items in the living area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a compact private living quarters featuring an office area with a desk and terminal, a sleeping area with a bunk bed, and a small living space with a coffee table. The room has metal walls with a window covered by shutters, a wall-mounted TV, and storage lockers. The character explores the room, examining the furniture and layout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vast, public industrial concourse into the intimate confines of a private living space. It begins in a spacious hall with high metal trusses, passing a large holographic head and a Mars recruitment poster while following a red-haired NPC through a crowd of pedestrians. As the character moves through a distant doorway, the environment shifts abruptly into a dim, narrow service corridor characterized by grated flooring and overhead utility pipes. The camera then proceeds past a supply cart and a waiting child toward door A12, before finally entering a compact living quarters. The scene concludes as the camera explores the interior of the room, moving from a desk and terminal toward a bunk bed and storage lockers under the shadow of shuttered windows.
